name: Dak's Ellen's Favorite Oat Bran Muffin Bread (Bread Machine
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Better for Bread white flour
1 can 8.25-oz can Libby's Lite Sliced Peaches, drained and cut into pieces
1 tbsp Raisins, warmed for 10 seconds in microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the machine's browning control to light.
2. Place all ingredients in the pan in the order listed.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting and press start.
